draftText:
Hi Sarah,

Thank you for reaching out about a potential partnership! I'd love to discuss how BY Influence can help TechVentures reach millions of engaged viewers through our creator network.

Our recent Whiteout Survival campaign generated 48M views and 100K+ new users. I believe we could achieve similar results for your upcoming product launch.

Would you be available for a 15-minute call this week?

Best,
BY Influence Team

Hi Marcus,

Great to hear from GameStudio Pro! Based on your requirements for a gaming campaign targeting Gen Z audiences, I'd recommend a package with ItssIMANNN.

Her audience demographics perfectly match your target - 70% 18-34, highly engaged gaming community.

Our standard packages range from $15K-50K depending on deliverables. Happy to customize based on your goals.

Let me know if you'd like to see a detailed proposal!

Best,
BY Influence Team

Hi Emily,

Thank you for your interest in influencer marketing for EduLearn AI!

We've had great success with education-focused campaigns, including our recent Gauth AI partnership that generated 15M+ views.

Could you share more about your target audience and campaign objectives? This will help me put together relevant options for you.

Looking forward to learning more!

Best,
BY Influence Team

Hi David,

Thanks for reaching out! I understand budget is a key consideration for MobileFirst Games.

We offer flexible packages and can work within various budget ranges. Our team is experienced in maximizing ROI for gaming campaigns.

Would you be open to a quick call to discuss your goals and explore options that fit your budget?

Best,
BY Influence Team

Hi Lisa,

Thank you for your question about integration capabilities!

Our campaigns typically include custom tracking links, affiliate codes, and detailed analytics dashboards. We can integrate with most major attribution platforms.

Would you like me to send over our integration documentation?

Best,
BY Influence Team
